title: refactor: simplify model_health pipe. one pipe for all time ranges, only 4xx/5xx groups
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: One pipe to rule them all
gist.blurb: We've streamlined our internal model health monitoring, merging multiple time-window pipes into a single, elegant query. Less code, cleaner dashboards, and happier bees!
gist.summary: Refactored the model health observability pipeline to use a single parameterized query instead of multiple time-based endpoints.
gist.impact: This reduces technical debt and simplifies the internal model monitoring dashboard by grouping error codes more efficiently.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny toolbelt, organizing glowing data pipes. The Nomnom creature eating old, deprecated code files. A clean, organized retro server room.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny toolbelt, organizing glowing lime green (#ecf874) data pipes in a retro server room. The round Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of deprecated code files nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
